title: Moacroton trigonocarpus
intro: There is no information available on a plant called Moacroton trigonocarpus.
parts: Moacroton trigonocarpus is reportedly used in traditional medicine. The leaves and roots of the plant are used for medicinal purposes. In folk medicine, the plant's extracts are used to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy of the plant's medicinal properties. The plant's active compounds and exact medicinal parts are still being studied by scientists.
preparations: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations of Moacroton trigonocarpus.
